imagery_direction: Render architectural impossibilities where moon craters hold holographic jazz ensembles, and cathedral walls drip with unpolished code. Use jagged negative space as a narrative device – let sunlight bleed through fractured marble to cast algorithmic shadows. Every surface should feel like it’s halfway between being built and being unmade.
dall_e_style_prefix: A paradoxical lunar cathedral under construction – brutalist concrete walls with embedded jazz records, stained-glass windows showing AI-generated poetry in Basquiat-style handwriting, digital craters filled with sunlight and smoke, rendered in 8K with visible chisel marks and algorithmic cracks
tagline: Find the angel in the marble. Keep the chisel marks.
